name: context.getContext
description: Get the current tenant context including active org, project, authentication state, and knowledge pack. Returns identity info, available scopes, and active pack metadata. Useful for debugging and understanding the current session state.

workspace_id.description: Optional workspace ID to check pack activation for. If not provided, uses the current session workspace.

user_id.description: Authenticated user ID (null if service principal auth)

service_principal_id.description: Authenticated service principal ID (null if user auth)

org_id.description: Current organization context (null if not set)

project_id.description: Current project context (null if not set)

active_pack.description: Active knowledge pack metadata for the workspace (null if no pack active)

workspace_id.description: Workspace ID used for pack activation lookup
